theme.archetype: Custom Editorial (Base: Swiss Brutalist + Jewel/Luxury typography)
theme.vibe: Elegant, editorial, high-end magazine, unobtrusive but premium.

dark_mode.description: Used EXCLUSIVELY for the immersive lights-out gallery viewer.

rules: Never use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF except in the dark gallery mode.
No gradients. UI must feel like printed paper and sharp ink.
Rely on 1px solid borders for separation, not shadows.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none

rules: Use Cormorant Garamond exclusively for dramatic, large text (H1, H2, Quotes, Contract Titles).
Use Manrope for all UI elements, dashboards, forms, and functional text.
Never center-align large paragraphs. Center-align H1 only if part of a symmetric cover page, otherwise left-align.
Use extremely tight letter spacing on large serif headings.

marketing.rules: Asymmetric, overlapping elements. Leave empty cells for negative space.

dashboard.rules: Dense, functional, strict alignment. 1px borders between widgets.

spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Grid Borders style. Expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse style layouts with sharp 0px border-radius (or max 2px). NO glassmorphism. NO drop shadows.

components.buttons: Square or extremely subtle rounding (rounded-sm). Solid black (primary) or transparent with 1px black border (outline). Hover states invert or change opacity slightly.
components.cards: Flat. 1px solid border. No shadow. Background matches parent or slightly offset (Surface color).
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults but remove border-radius. Use bottom-border only (flushed) for a printed form look in marketing, or full sharp box in the dashboard.
components.dialogs: Sharp corners, stark contrast, dimmed solid black backdrop (bg-black/80) instead of blurred.
components.navigation: Header must have solid background (bg-background) or a sharp bottom border to separate from hero. Not transparent.

rules: Micro-interactions only for standard UI (hover states, focus rings).
Use framer-motion for smooth staggered fade-ins on the marketing page.
Image Gallery transition must be slow and cinematic (e.g., 0.6s ease-in-out) fading everything to black.
Focus states: ring-1 ring-offset-2 ring-primary sharp.

lights_out_gallery: CRITICAL FEATURE: When a user clicks on an image in a gallery, activate 'Lights-Out' mode.
Implementation: Use global state (Zustand/Context). When active, hide the main Navbar and Footer. Change body background to #050505.
UI: Only show the high-res image, minimal left/right arrows (thin stroke icons), and a subtle 'Close' icon (X) in the top right.
No text or descriptions should be visible unless explicitly hovered.
contract_viewer: Design like a physical piece of A4 paper. Center a white #FFFFFF container with max-w-3xl on a muted grey background.
Use serif typography for the contract body.
Signature block should use a script-style font if typed, or an elegant canvas block if drawn.
booking_flow: Use Shadcn Calendar component but stylize it with sharp corners and serif month headers.

icons.usage: Use thin, elegant variants of icons.

hero_fashion.description: Use for the main landing page hero background or prominent portfolio display.

wedding_client.description: Use as placeholders for the client gallery preview, booking sections, or customer dashboard.

portraits_bw.description: Use for aesthetic fill, photographer bio picture, or generic portfolio items.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize Tailwind with the provided color hexes in tailwind.config.js.
2. Import Google Fonts 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' in index.css.
3. Set up Shadcn UI but aggressively remove default border-radiuses (rounded-md -> rounded-none or rounded-sm) to match the editorial sharp look.
4. Build a global Zustand store (`useGalleryStore`) to manage `isLightsOutMode`. Wrap the main layout to conditionally render Nav/Footer based on this state.
5. Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, gallery images) have a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case role-based naming.
6. Use the provided image URLs exclusively for media. DO NOT use placeholder text or dummy image generators.
7. Implement role-based routing (Admin vs User) and protect the routes.
8. E-signature component can just be an input that sets a stylized cursive font internally to mimic a signature.
